mapper.select: SELECT * FROM attendance ORDER BY year DESC, month DESC, day DESC
SELECT * FROM attendance WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY year DESC, month DESC, day DESC
SELECT * FROM attendance WHERE year = #{year} AND month = #{month} ORDER BY day ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (user_id, year, month, day, status, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{year}, #{month}, #{day}, #{status}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance SET status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance WHERE year = #{year} AND month = #{month}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND year = #{year} AND month = #{month}
